items.content_html: * Big Tech * Apple # Apple executive in charge of Vision Pro is reportedly leaving for OpenAI Paul Meade will start OpenAI's hardware division, 'Bloomberg' says. By Mariella Moon June 27, 2026 3:36 am EST A side view of Apple's Vision Pro headset. Apple Paul Meade, an Apple VP who heads the Vision Products Group, is reportedly leaving the company next week for OpenAI. According to Bloomberg, the top executive in charge of the Vision Pro headset and Apple's smart glasses projects will be starting up the AI company's hardware unit. items.title: [Gizmodo] Everyone Wants to Build AI Using Someone Else’s Work
items.content_html: Not long after the generative AI boom took the business world and Wall Street by storm, a chorus of complaints started being leveled against companies like OpenAI, Microsoft, Anthropic, and Google, whose models were trained using a sizable chunk of all the content that’s ever been published on the internet—including, as many subsequent lawsuits would allege, massive quantities of copyrighted materials.
